rds_events.message: The user requested a failover of the DB instance.

interpretation.rto: 15.808 seconds is the client-visible recovery interval from the last successful DB probe before the first failure to the first of three consecutive successes after the final failure.
interpretation.rpo: Zero applies only to 284 writes that returned HTTP 200 and were verified after failover; the three failed or timed-out attempts are not claimed as committed data.
interpretation.event_timing: AWS RDS event completion timestamps describe control-plane failover progress and are not substituted for the application-observed RTO.
